奈何，末世的动物早就化为了丧尸，他根本没办法契约，最终丧生在丧尸口中。
临终之际，他唯一的念头便是：如果能重来一次，他一定要培养一支宠物大军。
秦岳真的重生了，还重生到了丧尸爆发前的三个月。
就连系统也跟着重生了！
宠物店中：
“老板，宠物我全要了！”
“啊！……帅哥，你说真的？”
“…”
动物园：
“李哥，如果，我是说如果，你们动物园的老虎卖吗？”
“小秦……你跟我开玩笑吧？”
“汗，我就问问！那啥，李哥，你知道哪里能买老虎吗？”
“……”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/e325d1c851038b44290e5e12a49e0a5f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"幻想狂野派","author_id":"","book_id":"7611820019869043774","book_name":"丧尸最高六阶？我宠物最低九阶！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":74,"name":"宠物","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=74&name=宠物&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7611866215073448510","read_count":"12731","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"171326"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"79","tags":"科幻末世,系统,重生,末世,宠物,求生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e325d1c851038b44290e5e12a49e0a5f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779396883&x-signature=SAy7EuTsu%2Bi3QJtt4o3QAt8tpG0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"971599428196212","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"46"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230454432737B5E5FBA296DFC118"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_durati
